import fs from 'node:fs';
import path from 'node:path';

const mode = process.argv[2] ?? 'low';
const receiptPath = path.resolve('artifacts', 'finite', `${mode}-receipt.json`);
fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(receiptPath), { recursive: true });
fs.writeFileSync(receiptPath, `${JSON.stringify({
  fixture: 'agent-surfaces',
  mode,
  pid: process.pid
}, null, 2)}\n`);

console.log(`agent-surfaces-finite-stdout:${mode}`);
console.error(`agent-surfaces-finite-stderr:${mode}`);
